name: Raspberry Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush raspberries and pass through a strainer to remove seeds (optional, but it dramatically increases the enjoyability of the pie when you don't have to deal with raspberry seeds!). Use 1 cup of crushed fruit.
2. Add 1/2 cup sugar and let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Soften gelatin in cold water; dissolve over low heat. Cool completely.
4. Combine raspberries, lemon juice, and a dash of salt. Chill, stirring occasionally until partially set.
5. Beat egg whites to soft peaks. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Fold in the strawberry mixture (raspberry) and whipped cream. Chill until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
7. Pile into the cooled shell. Chill firm for about five hours.
8. Trim with whipped cream.
Variation: You may use strawberries instead of raspberries.
